messages.content: Would love to setup a call it might be easier to explain and also show you

Hey just following up ! Essentially our commision is based off revenue. As your revenue increases our commision is usually offset. As for how involved w messaging and account access, we set a dedicated team onto your page and youâll be in constant contact with them via telegram. Itâs supper organized! Customs, content requests, page setup, wall posts etc are all discussed there each week!
Howâs your revenue been this year? To handle messaging yourself is almost impossible as the account continues to grow. I give you credit!

Hey! Our team works to manage the backend of the page (wall posts , ppv, mass messages, help with pricing). Our chat team is amazing and you can stay in constant contact with them throughout the day. Unlike most agencies though, we handle marketing for each creator. We invest in social media management, clippers, editors, and help manage multiple accounts on IG, X, Reddit, etc. We manage a lot of YouTubers and OFTV creators as well, so we also offer in house editing there.

hi! I currently manage most of my content and messaging myself, so Iâd love to understand a little more about how your team works. What does your commission structure look like, and how involved are you with account access and messaging?

Hey! Love the content. I actually manage some of the top creators on OF and Telegram (mostly within the top 1% and some in the top .1%)! We specialize in 360 marketing and work with a select group of niche creators and other creators we know we can scale. What are you doing for marketing right now? We manage a bunch of platforms, which most agencies donât do. This includes full chat team and managers, IG, Reddit, X, Telgram and we do OFTV creation and content houses every month or two. Would love to talk about you joining our team. You have a great page and I think we could scale you a lot. Plus we have a competitive commission scale. Let me know if you want to setup a phone call or group chat with my team to discuss what we can do! We have all female account management as well and our teams based between Palm Beach and LA! Let me know if you have any questions. Would love to talk more!
